title: 10 — Prior Art & Lessons (from the abandoned attempt)
summary: Distills reuse/drop/avoid lessons from a prior abandoned visual Linux distro builder attempt to guide the DebateOS restart.
notes: Manifest declared type DOC; content confirms it (prose retrospective with reuse/drop/avoid guidance, no requirements or single decision). References decision IDs D6, D11, D13 in docs/09-decisions.md.
